# Entertainer's Pack

An Entertainer's Pack contains the following items: [[backpack]], [[bedroll]], [[bell]], [[bullseye_lantern Lantern]], 3 [[costume]], [[mirror]], 8 flasks of [[oil]], 9 days of [[rations]], [[tinderbox]], and [[waterskin]].
